title: Geodes+
description: Geodes+ is a lightweight mod that adds a geode loot-box type mechanic inspired by Stardew Valley.
body:
# ⛏️Geodes+
___
Geodes+ is a lightweight mod that adds 4 lootbox-esque resources you can find while mining! Whenever you are exploring caves with this mod installed, you can find stones that don't look quite right called **nodules**. Mining these will drop their respective geode, openable with a pickaxe in your offhand or at a stonecutter!
# Please Read
___
This mod requires pickaxe recognition which, as it stands, is manually setup. If there are any pickaxes from any mods you would want added to the compatability list, feel free to send them my way! I will be working on a more easily configurable release with settings to tweak ore spawnrate, loot-tables, and maybe to enable fortune enchantments!
Also note that all requests, suggestions, and comments are welcome and appreciated! Let me know if you have any problems or want anything new added!
# 💎Geode Loot Tables
___
| Geode Item           | **Most Common**               | --------------              | --------------              | -------------             | **Rarest**              |
|----------------------|-------------------------------|-----------------------------|-----------------------------|---------------------------|-------------------------|
| **Stone Geode**      | 40% for 1 - 2  Coal           | 37% for 2 - 4  Raw Copper   | 20% for 1 - 2  Raw Iron     | 3% for 1 - 2  Diamond     | N/A                     |
| **Deepslate Geode**  | 30% for 1 - 3  Raw Iron       | 20% for 4 - 8 Lapis Lazuli  | 20% for 4 - 8 Redstone      | 20% for 1 - 3 Raw Gold    | 10% for 1 - 2 Diamond   |
| **Sandstone Geode**  | 30% for 1 - 2 Any Coral Block | 30% for 1 - 2 Any Coral Fan | 30% for 1 - 2  Any Coral    | 10% for 1 - 2 Bone        | N/A                     |
| **Netherrack Geode** | 40% for 4 - 8 Quartz          | 35% for 1 - 4 Raw Gold      | 10% for 1 - 2  Blaze Powder | 10% for 1 - 2 Fire Charge | 5% for 1 Ancient Debris |
# Legal
___
This project is under the MIT license, meaning you are free to do whatever you want with the project! Feel free to add it to any modpacks, and to modify it for mod compatability. If you do modify it, please credit me as the base for your modified project. Also, do not create alternative download links to the project!
